properties.displayName: Office app spawning script/LOLBin child process
properties.description: Classic macro/exploit pattern — Office app launching cmd/powershell/wmic/regsvr32.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName endswith "\winword.exe"
   or ParentProcessName endswith "\excel.exe"
   or ParentProcessName endswith "\powerpnt.exe"
   or ParentProcessName endswith "\outlook.exe"
   or ParentProcessName endswith "\onenote.exe"
   or ParentProcessName endswith "\mspub.exe"
   or ParentProcessName endswith "\visio.exe"
| where NewProcessName endswith "\cmd.exe"
   or NewProcessName endswith "\powershell.exe"
   or NewProcessName endswith "\pwsh.exe"
   or NewProcessName endswith "\wscript.exe"
   or NewProcessName endswith "\cscript.exe"
   or NewProcessName endswith "\mshta.exe"
   or NewProcessName endswith "\rundll32.exe"
   or NewProcessName endswith "\regsvr32.exe"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName,
          NewProcessName, CommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
